summary: Verified Mira OS Canonical Conversational Flow - Products shown ONLY after explicit opt-in (turn 3+), service desk ticket creation, real-time transcript logging, and Concierge handoff functionality. All features working correctly.

first_message_no_products.test: Send 'Show me some treats for Buddy' as first message
first_message_no_products.actual: Mira responded with clarifying question, highlighted in amber box, with quick reply chips. NO products shown.

second_message_no_products.test: Click 'Everyday light treats' quick reply as second message
second_message_no_products.actual: Mira continued conversation with more context. NO products shown.

third_message_shows_products.test: Send 'Suggest a few treats' as third message (product opt-in)
third_message_shows_products.expected: Products should appear after explicit opt-in
third_message_shows_products.actual: Products displayed with images, prices (₹), 'Add' buttons, and personalized header 'Suggested for Buddy (Chicken allergy-free)'

concierge_handoff.test: Click 'Ask my Concierge® about these' link
concierge_handoff.expected: Confirmation message and ticket status flip
concierge_handoff.actual: Mira showed 'I've asked your pet Concierge® to help with this. They'll review everything we've discussed about Buddy and get back to you here.'
concierge_handoff.console_log: [HANDOFF] Ticket handed off to Concierge: TCK-2026-000002 -> Queue: FOOD

quick_reply_chips.details: 3 contextual chips displayed under Mira's clarifying question

highlighted_question.details: Question highlighted in amber/orange gradient box

product_display.details: 5 products with images, prices (₹), 'Add' buttons, and personalized reasons

composer_pinned.details: Composer always visible at bottom, even after scrolling

feedback_buttons.details: 'Was this helpful?' with thumbs up/down buttons

safety_tips.details: 'Important to Watch For' collapsible section with allergy warnings

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 101 verified canonical conversational flow: 1) Products ONLY shown after explicit opt-in (turn >= 3 with phrases like 'suggest a few treats'). 2) First/second messages show clarifying questions with NO products. 3) Quick reply chips appear under highlighted question. 4) Service desk APIs working: /api/mira/route_intent, /api/service_desk/attach_or_create_ticket, /api/service_desk/append_message, /api/service_desk/handoff_to_concierge. 5) Ticket status correctly flips from 'open_mira_only' to 'open_concierge' on handoff. 6) Full conversation transcript synced to ticket. 7) Mobile viewport tested and working.

canonical_flow.key_rule: Products shown ONLY after explicit user opt-in (not on first message)

service_desk_integration.handoff: Flips ticket status, doesn't create new ticket
